title: [FIRRTL] infer width (shl)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp74: UInt<7>
    tmp74 <= shl(UInt("b1000"), 3)
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: error: destination width 7 is not greater than or equal to source width 8
    tmp74 <= shl(UInt("b1000"), 3)
          ^
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%tmp74, %0) : (!firrtl.uint<7>, !firrtl.uint<8>) -> ()
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [6:0] tmp74
);
  assign tmp74 = 7'h40;
endmodule
```
